S.FORM: Lorenzo Brown hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw / p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 8, Lorenzo Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: lorenzo Œ≤rown ƒßja î…£a nŒ≤a p…£naw î mari î mis~…ïuw qanij, qutux s~…ïa p îaras~…ï mari î taj s~…ïuruw / p îa…£al tins~…ï î taj s~…ïuruw. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, lorenzo Œ≤rown, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
